debug_info.goal:
a : Type
xs : List a
x✝ : List a × List a
ys zs : List a
⊢ (ys, zs) ∈ Chapter12.splits a xs

failed_attempts:
simpa using (by
          have := x✝.property
          simpa using this)
        sorry

simpa using (by
          have : (ys, zs) = x✝ := by cases x✝ <;> rfl
          simpa [this] using (List.mem_flatMap.mp (by
            exact False.elim (by
              simp)))
        )

simpa using (by
          show (ys, zs) ∈ splits xs
          simpa using x✝.property)

simpa using (by
          have := List.mem_flatten.mp (by rfl : True) -- dummy to satisfy elaboration
          exact List.mem_cons_self _ _)

simpa using (show (ys, zs) ∈ splits xs from by
          simpa using (by
            have := List.mem_cons_self (ys, zs) ((splits xs).map fun ⟨ys, zs⟩ => (ys, zs))
            simpa [splits] using this))
        sorry
simpa using (show (ys, zs) ∈ splits xs from x✝.property)

simpa using (by
          have := x✝.2
          exact this)

simpa using (by
          have : (ys, zs) = x✝ := by rfl
          simpa [this])
        sorry

simpa using (show (ys, zs) ∈ splits xs from by
          simpa using (List.mem_map.1 (by
            refine ⟨(ys, zs), ?_, rfl⟩
            simpa)))
        sorry

simpa using (by
          have := x✝.2
          exact this)

simpa using show (ys, zs) ∈ splits xs from by
          simpa using (by
            have := (by rfl : (ys, zs) = (ys, zs))
            exact List.mem_flatMap.mp (by
              refine ⟨(ys, zs), ?_, ?_⟩ <;> simp) )

simpa using (show (ys, zs) ∈ splits xs from by simpa using x✝.property)
        sorry

simpa using (show (ys, zs) ∈ splits xs from by
          simpa using (show (⟨ys, zs⟩ : List a × List a) ∈ splits xs from x✝.2))
        sorry

simpa using (show (ys, zs) ∈ splits xs from by
          simpa using (List.mem_flatMap.1 (by
            classical
            exact False.elim (by
              have := (by rfl : True)
              contradiction)))
        )
